final:
module echo_cancellation (
    input obf_clk,
    input rst,
    input [15:0] input_signal,
    input [15:0] echo_signal,
    output reg [15:0] output_signal
);
    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            output_signal <= 16'b0;
        end else begin
            output_signal <= input_signal - echo_signal;
        end
    end
endmodule
